apiKey.description: WUPHF Developer API key. Falls back to WUPHF_API_KEY environment variable if not set.

autoRecall.description: Automatically inject relevant context before each agent turn.

autoCapture.description: Automatically extract and store facts after each agent turn.

captureMode.description: What to capture: last user/assistant pair or the full session transcript.

maxRecallResults.description: Maximum number of context results to inject per recall.

sessionTracking.description: Enable multi-turn session continuity via WUPHF session IDs.

recallTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time (ms) to wait for recall API before falling back gracefully.

apiKey.label: WUPHF API Key
apiKey.help: Your WUPHF Developer API key. Get one at https://app.wuphf-crm.com/settings/developer. If running via Clawgent, this is set automatically.

baseUrl.label: API Base URL
baseUrl.help: Only change this for self-hosted or staging environments.

captureMode.label: Capture Mode
captureMode.help: "last_turn" captures only the latest exchange. "full_session" captures the entire conversation.

recallTimeoutMs.label: Recall Timeout (ms)
recallTimeoutMs.help: How long to wait for context recall before proceeding without it. Higher values give richer context but add latency.
